Class-Warlock 20 — Male Human Warlock: 20
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 14 (+2) Constitution: 10 (+0) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 8 (-1) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: Celtic-Nuada (N)
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 484258/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Gift Of The Depths: Has a 30' swim Speed and can breathe water
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Warlock (Eldritch Invocation): 10; Warlock (Warlock Subclass): 1
Feats: Alert; Boon Of Irresistible Offense; Defense; Great Weapon Fighting; Savage Attacker Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Warlock Features: Agonizing Blast; Armor Of Shadows; Armor Training (Light); Ascendant Step; Contact Patron; Dark One's Blessing; Dark One's Own Luck; Devil's Sight; Devouring Blade; Eldritch Invocations; Eldritch Master; Eldritch Mind; Eldritch Smite; Eldritch Spear; Epic Boon; Fiend Patron; Fiend Spells; Fiendish Resilience; Fiendish Vigor; Gaze Of Two Minds; Gift Of The Depths; Gift Of The Protectors; Hurl Through Hell; Investment Of The Chain Master; Lessons Of The First Ones; Lifedrinker; Magical Cunning; Mask Of Many Faces; Master Of Myriad Forms; Misty Visions; Mystic Arcanum; One With Shadows; Otherworldly Leap; Pact Magic; Pact Of The Blade; Pact Of The Chain; Pact Of The Tome; Repelling Blast; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, History, Intimidation, Investigation, Nature, Religion); Thirsting Blade; Visions Of Distant Realms; Warlock Subclass; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons); Whispers Of The Grave; Witch Sight Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 General Feat
Lessons Of The First Ones: +1 Origin Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Warlock Subclass: 1 selection
Dark One's Own Luck: Can add 1d10 to an ability check or save 3 times per long rest
Devil's Sight: R120' Sees normally in darkness
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Insight; Intimidation; Performance; Religion
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +5 Performance: (cha) +9
Animal Handling: (wis) -1 Intimidation: (cha) +9 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +6 Medicine: (wis) -1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) -1 Survival: (wis) -1
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Witch Sight: Has 30' Truesight
Combat
Hit Points: 55 Initiative: +8 Armor Class: 12 Attacks Per Round: 1
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: undefined Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+8 1d4+2 P R20/60); Sickle (+6 1d4 S); Sling (+8 1d4+2 B R30/120); Unarmed (+6 1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Devouring Blade: Has increased Thirsting Blade effects
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Dark One's Blessing: Reducing a foe to 0 hit points gives self 23 temporary hit points; others reducing a foe within 10' to 0 hit points gives the same benefit
Eldritch Smite: Can spend a spell slot on a pact weapon hit to inflict +1d8 HP force plus +1d8 HP force per spell level and to inflict prone on a Huge or smaller target
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Hurl Through Hell: After a successful attack, can inflict 8d10 HP psychic and cause the target to disappear until the end of the next turn (save Charisma negates; fiends take no damage) once per long rest; can expend spell slots for additional uses
Lifedrinker: Can inflict +1d6 HP of a choice of necrotic, psychic, or radiant with a pact weapon, plus expend a Hit Point Die to regain hit points, once per turn
Pact Of The Chain: Can forego one attack to allow familiar to attack as a reaction
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Thirsting Blade: Attack action with a pact blade allows 3 attacks
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +9; Constitution: +0; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +0; Wisdom: +5
Save Notes:
Eldritch Mind: Has advantage on Constitution saves to maintain concentration
Fiendish Resilience: At the end of a rest, can gain resistance to a chosen non-force damage type
Magic
Spell Slots: K0: 4; K5: 4 Attack: C: 5; K: 9 Spell DC: C: 13; K: 17
Spells:
Alter Self (K2 [Master Of Myriad Forms] Tran): Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains magic natural weapons with +10 attack and 1d6+4 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Eye (K4 [Visions Of Distant Realms] Divi): R30' Self sees with darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Burning Hands (K1 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Command (K1 [Fiend Spells] Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Contact Other Plane (K5 Divi): Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives 5 one-word answers) [R]
Contact Other Plane (K5 [Contact Patron] Divi): Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives 5 one-word answers) [R]
Disguise Self (K1 [Mask Of Many Faces] Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Dream (K5 Illu): Touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates)
Eldritch Blast (K0 Evoc): R300' Ranged spell creates 4 rays that inflict 1d10 HP force each
False Life (K1 [Fiendish Vigor] Necr): Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Find Familiar (K1 [Pact Of The Chain] Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Fire Shield (K4 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): Self gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold damage, and a successful adjacent attacker suffers 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fireball (K3 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Geas (K5 [Fiend Spells] Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Hold Monster (K5 Ench): R90' Paralyzes the target creature (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Insect Plague (K5 [Fiend Spells] Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Invisibility (K2 [One With Shadows] Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Jump (K1 [Otherworldly Leap] Tran): Touched gains 30' jump after a 10' move for 1 min
Levitate (K2 [Ascendant Step] Tran): R60' Target floats (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Mage Armor (K1 [Armor Of Shadows] Abju): Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (K0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Poison Spray (K0 Conj): 1
Scorching Ray (K2 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks inflict 2d6 HP fire each [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Scrying (K5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Silent Image (K1 [Misty Visions] Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Speak With Dead (K3 [Whispers Of The Grave] Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Stinking Cloud (K3 [Fiend Spells] Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Suggestion (K2 [Fiend Spells] Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr
True Strike (K0 Divi): +9 attack with held weapon inflicts +3d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Wall Of Fire (K4 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Water Breathing (K3 [Gift Of The Depths] Tran): R30' 10 targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Magic Notes:
Eldritch Invocations: 10 selections
Eldritch Master: Has increased Magical Cunning effects
Agonizing Blast: Chosen Warlock cantrip inflicts +3 HP
Armor Of Shadows: Can cast Mage Armor on self at will
Ascendant Step: Can cast Levitate on self at will
Contact Patron: Can use Contact Other Plane to contact patron once per long rest
Eldritch Spear: Increases the range of a chosen ranged Warlock cantrip by 600'
Fiendish Vigor: Can cast False Life on self at will, gaining the maximum possible temporary hit points
Gaze Of Two Minds: Touch allows self to perceive through the senses of a willing humanoid, and cast spells through it when within 60', while maintained
Gift Of The Depths: Can cast Water Breathing once per long rest
Gift Of The Protectors: A creature who has written its name in the Book Of Shadows retains 1 hit point when reduced to 0 hit points once per long rest
Investment Of The Chain Master: Familiar gains a 40' fly or swim Speed, can inflict a choice of necrotic or radiant damage, and inflicts DC 17 saves; self can use a bonus action to command it to attack and a reaction to give it resistance to damage
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magical Cunning: Can use a 1 min process to regain all Pact Magic spell slots once per long rest
Mask Of Many Faces: Can cast Disguise Self at will
Master Of Myriad Forms: Can cast Alter Self at will
Misty Visions: Can cast Silent Image at will
Mystic Arcanum: Can cast chosen K6, K7, K8, and K9 spells without using a spell slot once per long rest
One With Shadows: Can cast Invisibility on self in dim light at will
Otherworldly Leap: Can cast Jump on self at will
Pact Magic: Can cast spells from the Warlock spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Pact Of The Blade: Can use a bonus action to create a bonded simple or martial pact weapon or to bond with a touched magic weapon and gain proficiency with it; it can be used as a spellcasting focus, and its Charisma-based attacks inflict a choice of necrotic, psychic, radiant, or normal weapon damage; moving 5' away from the weapon for 1 min ends the bond
Pact Of The Chain: Can cast Find Familiar without expending a spell slot
Pact Of The Tome: Has a Book Of Shadows containing 3 chosen cantrips and 2 chosen level 1 rituals from any spell lists
Repelling Blast: Can inflict a 10' push on a Large or smaller target with a successful attack using a chosen Warlock cantrip
Visions Of Distant Realms: Can cast Arcane Eye at will
Whispers Of The Grave: Can cast Speak With Dead at will
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 11 available vs. 29 allocated
